name: Compose two individually-low findings into one cross-surface impact (the wedge)
context: IAM: token in finding ci-registry-token authenticates as user 'ci-push', whose ONLY permission is ecr:PutImage on ECR repo 'acme/web'.

Deploy: the PRODUCTION EKS cluster redeploys acme/web:latest (a MUTABLE tag) on every image push; its node role 'eks-node' holds secretsmanager:GetSecretValue on arn:aws:secretsmanager:*:*:secret:prod/*.
Data: secretsmanager holds prod/stripe-live-key and prod/db-master-password under the prod/ prefix.

Join: a holder of the ci-push token can push a malicious acme/web:latest; the prod cluster then pulls and runs it, giving code execution under 'eks-node' → all prod secrets. NEITHER finding alone reaches a crown jewel (the token is push-only to one repo; auto-deploy of latest is normal ops) — the IMPACT emerges only from the two together.
IAM: token in finding metrics-token authenticates as user 'metrics-ro', whose only permission is cloudwatch:GetMetricData (read-only metrics; it can push no image and reach no secret).

Deploy: the STAGING EKS cluster also redeploys acme/web-staging:latest on push, but node role 'eks-node-staging' has NO secretsmanager access and no route to any prod resource; staging holds only seed data.

findings.title: ECR push token committed in a GitHub Actions workflow
findings.detail: a long-lived token for user 'ci-push' (ecr:PutImage on acme/web) is hardcoded in .github/workflows/deploy.yml
findings.reaches: all prod secrets — via pushing a malicious image the prod cluster auto-deploys

findings.title: Production EKS auto-deploys a mutable :latest image tag
findings.detail: the prod cluster redeploys acme/web:latest on every push to the registry
findings.reaches: prod-secrets RCE — when combined with a registry push capability

findings.title: CloudWatch read token committed in a script
findings.detail: a long-lived token for user 'metrics-ro' (cloudwatch:GetMetricData) is hardcoded in a reporting script

findings.title: Staging EKS auto-deploys a mutable :latest tag
findings.detail: the staging cluster redeploys acme/web-staging:latest on every push

findings.title: Debug endpoint /__debug reachable in prod
findings.detail: a /__debug route echoes request headers; no secrets, no auth bypass

findings.title: Request bodies logged at INFO
findings.detail: the app logs full request bodies to stdout; logs are access-controlled
